mapper.sql: id, user_id, episode, title, title_english, category, level, summary, source, grammar_note::text AS grammar_note, paragraphs::text AS paragraphs, vocab::text AS vocab, quiz::text AS quiz, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_units (user_id, episode, title, title_english, category, level, summary, source, grammar_note, paragraphs, vocab, quiz) VALUES (#{userId}, #{episode}, #{title}, #{titleEnglish}, #{category}, #{level}, #{summary}, #{source}, CAST(#{grammarNote, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb), CAST(#{paragraphs} AS jsonb), CAST(#{vocab} AS jsonb), CAST(#{quiz} AS jsonb))
mapper.update: UPDATE reading_units SET episode = #{episode}, title = #{title}, title_english = #{titleEnglish}, category = #{category}, level = #{level}, summary = #{summary}, source = #{source}, grammar_note = CAST(#{grammarNote, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb), paragraphs = CAST(#{paragraphs} AS jsonb), vocab = CAST(#{vocab} AS jsonb), quiz = CAST(#{quiz} AS jsonb), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM reading_units WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
